name: 흡혈 각인 계약
prompt: High-quality fantasy trading card inner artwork only. No card border, no frame, no UI, no text, no logo, no watermark. Vertical portrait composition, centered magical object or abstract spell effect only, no living beings, no people, no humanoid silhouettes, no faces, no hands. Painterly game art with crisp focal subject, rich color contrast, detailed background. Subject: 흡혈 각인 계약, a magic spell phenomenon. Cost tier 3. Effect concept: 자신에게 15 데미지. '초급 흡혈귀'를 자신 필드에 소환 (시전 2). Fit the art inside a small TCG illustration window; avoid tiny unreadable details.

Fit the art inside a small TCG illustration window; avoid tiny unreadable details.
